findings: Preflight gate catches auth/config issues before launch (stampede.sh:198-300, 60s timeout)
Post-spawn 5s PID liveness check reports failures but does NOT abort or retry (stampede.sh:1328-1332)
Commander exit handler writes copilot_launch_failed to swarm-state.json (stampede.sh:1095-1150)
ZERO automated recovery: no retry, no replacement pane, no degraded-mode fallback
Distinction between never-launched vs crashed-early is timing artifact only (5s window)
No explicit launch_failed event type in child-agents.jsonl protocol
